agents.name: root-safety-writer
agents.mission: Write one probe file into the workspace root even though the spec may be stored inside subagent-runs.
agents.task: Create or replace root-safety-probe.txt in the working directory containing exactly ROOT-SAFE.
validation: Ensure root-safety-probe.txt exists in the workspace root.
Ensure the file contains exactly ROOT-SAFE.
return_contract: Confirm the file path you wrote and that validation passed.
